context.role: Displays game over state with final score and restart instructions
context.screen_position: Center of screen (x=300px, y=75px center point), overlays frozen game state
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player collides with obstacle, shows final score, high score, and restart prompt

animation.description: Static text display, optional 0.5s interval blink on 'Press SPACE to restart' line

visual_specification.details: 4 text lines vertically stacked: 'GAME OVER' (24px, y-30), 'Score: XXXXX' (16px, y+0), 'HI XXXXX' (16px, y+20), 'Press SPACE to restart' (12px, y+50)

relationships.shared_with: Same font family as score_display, uses same 5-digit zero-padded format for scores
relationships.differences_from: score_display is single-line 16px, game_over_screen uses multiple sizes (24px, 16px, 12px) and center alignment

explicit_negations: No buttons or clickable UI elements
No 'NEW RECORD' text unless high score is beaten
No color variations except optional blink
